titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Pierson College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1964-2014 Maintained by the Dean
Pierson College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1964-2014 Maintained by the Dean
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 5, 2020 at 08:26

did.unittitle: Pierson College, Yale University, student records for the Classes of 1964-2014 maintained by the dean
did.abstract: The records consist of student records maintained by the dean of Pierson College, Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-J-1 (YRG 13-J-1), Records of the dean of Pierson College.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pierson College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1964-2014 Maintained by the Dean (RU 256). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged chronologically by Class year, thereunder alphabetically by student name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records maintained by the dean of Pierson College, Yale University.
